title: Letterhead - Metadata API
description: Represents formatting options for the letterhead in an email template. A letterhead defines the logo, page color, and text settings for your HTML email templates. Use letterheads to ensure a consistent look and feel in your company’s emails.

available.description: Indicates whether this letterhead can be used (true) or not (false), for example, in an email template.

backgroundColor.description: The background color, in hexadecimal, for example #FF6600.

bottomLine.description: The style for the bottom line. Valid style values include: color. The color of the line in hexadecimal, as a string value. height. The height of the line, as an int value.

description.description: Text description of how this letterhead differs from other letterheads.

fullName.description: The internal name of the letterhead, based on the name, but with white spaces and special characters escaped out for validity.

middleLine.description: The style for the middle border line in your letterhead. Valid style values include: color. The color of the line in hexadecimal, as a string value. height. The height of the line, as an int value.

topLine.description: The style for the top horizontal line below the header. Valid style values include: color. The color of the line in hexadecimal, as a string value. height. The height of the line, as an int value.

backgroundColor.description: The background color of the header or footer in hexadecimal format.

height.description: The height of the header or footer.

horizontalAlignment.description: The horizontal alignment of the header or footer. Valid values are: None Left Center Right

logo.description: The logo which is a reference to a document, for example MyFolder/MyDocument.gif.

verticalAlignment.description: The vertical alignment of the header or footer. Valid values are: None Top Middle Bottom

color.description: The color of the line in hexadecimal format.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Letterhead">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="available" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="backgroundColor" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="bodyColor" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="bottomLine" type="tns:LetterheadLine"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="footer" type="tns:LetterheadHeaderFooter"/>
        <xsd:element name="header" type="tns:LetterheadHeaderFooter"/>
        <xsd:element name="middleLine" type="tns:LetterheadLine"/>
        <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="topLine" type="tns:LetterheadLine"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="LetterheadHeaderFooter">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="backgroundColor" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="height" type="xsd:int"/>
    <xsd:element name="horizontalAlignment" minOccurs="0" type="tns:LetterheadHorizontalAlignment"/>
    <xsd:element name="logo" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="verticalAlignment" minOccurs="0" type="tns:LetterheadVerticalAlignment"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="LetterheadHorizontalAlignment">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="None"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Left"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Center"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Right"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="LetterheadLine">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="color" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="height" type="xsd:int"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="LetterheadVerticalAlignment">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="None"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Top"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Middle"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Bottom"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
